structures.note: Introduces contrast between expectation and reality.

breakdown.japanese: 今日は大事な会議があるのに
breakdown.cue: Sets up the expectation: there is an important meeting today.

breakdown.japanese: まだ準備ができていません。
breakdown.cue: Contrasts that expectation with the speaker still not being ready.

translation.fullEnglish: Even though I have an important meeting today, I still haven't finished preparing.
